description: Active-run anomaly totals by canonical anomaly type.
sql:
SELECT * FROM (WITH active_stage AS (
  SELECT s.*
  FROM featurestore:merged_anomaly_processing_manifest_v2 m
  JOIN featurestore:merged_anomaly_stage_summary_v2 s
    ON s.processing_run_id = m.active_run_id
   AND s.name = m.name
   AND s.stage_num_td = m.stage_num_td
   AND s.algorithm_version = m.algorithm_version
  WHERE m.status = 'active'
    AND m.algorithm_version = 'ds-v1'
    AND m.fleet_name = :fleet_name
    AND m.pad_name = :pad_name
    AND (
      COALESCE(CAST(:well_name AS TEXT), '') IN ('', '__ALL__')
      OR m.name = CAST(:well_name AS TEXT)
    )
)
, totals AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(SUM(pressure_surge_lines), 0) AS pressure_surge,
    COALESCE(SUM(pump_rate_drop_lines), 0) AS pump_rate_drop,
    COALESCE(SUM(mid_stage_shutdown_lines), 0) AS mid_stage_shutdown,
    COALESCE(SUM(sweep_lines), 0) AS sweep
  FROM active_stage
)
SELECT *
FROM (
  VALUES
    (1, 'Pressure Surges', (SELECT pressure_surge FROM totals), '#D35400'),
    (2, 'Pump Rate Drops', (SELECT pump_rate_drop FROM totals), '#2878B5'),
    (3, 'Mid-Stage Shutdowns', (SELECT mid_stage_shutdown FROM totals), '#30343B'),
    (4, 'Sweep', (SELECT sweep FROM totals), '#2A9D6F')
) AS v(sort_order, anomaly_type, anomaly_lines, color)
ORDER BY sort_order
) q
